evals.prompt: Generate a bar chart of my workouts for the past year and save it as an image.
evals.expected_output: A workout_chart.png file in the project root showing monthly workout counts as a bar chart, plus a summary of total workouts and busiest month.

evals.prompt: How many workouts did I do each month this year? Plot my progress.
evals.expected_output: workout_chart.png created, with each bar labelled with count, x-axis showing month labels, report of total and peak month.

evals.prompt: Show me my workout history chart.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs the Python script, saves workout_chart.png, and tells the user where it was saved along with data highlights.
